description_long: This is an open book with a light brown, slightly textured cover and white pages filled with printed text. The book is lying flat, with the pages gently curving upward at the center, suggesting it is well-used or naturally resting open. The text on the pages is dense and appears to be in a standard serif font, though the content is not legible from the images. The edges of the pages are clean and the book's binding is visible along the spine, which is subtly rounded. There are no visible illustrations, graphics, or decorative elements on the cover or pages. The overall appearance is that of a standard, medium-sized hardcover book, suitable for reading or study in an urban environment.
description: An open, medium-sized hardcover book with a light brown cover and white, text-filled pages. The book is plain, with no visible illustrations or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with both pages visible and a gentle upward curve at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the book and the layered appearance of the pages.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open pages and the book's spine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the book's thickness and the even alignment of the pages.
